CONTENT.Career: Brahimi began his career at his local club of FC Villepinte. He played there from the ages of 6 to 15. Then, he went on to play for FC Montfermeil for one season. Brahimi continued his career at Troyes, where he would go on to play 36 matches and score 8 goals for the reserve side. In 2020, he signed for Le Havre; at the club, he made 3 appearances for the reserve team.In 2021, Brahimi signed for Ligue 2 club Dunkerque. He made his professional debut for the club in a 1–1 draw against Quevilly-Rouen on 24 July 2021.On 27 June 2022, Brahimi signed a four-year contract with Caen.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in France, Brahimi holds French and Algerian nationalities.

SUMMARY: Bilal Brahimi (born 28 March 2000) is a French professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for  Ligue 2 club Caen.
